name: useMenuActive
description: Parses a navigation tree and recursively determines the active route context based on the incoming path key.
usage_guidelines: Powers the sidebar and header menus by calculating what should be highlighted, including parent menus for deep children.
Returns both the specific active route and the top-level tree.

params.name: navTree
params.description: The global or partial navigation structure.

return_value.description: Contains information about the active tree element and the top-level tree.

Do: Use to style active navigation links dynamically.
Dont: Avoid re-calculating the nav trees directly; memoization is built-in.
